blockers.description: recviz_charts Alembic migration 003 must be run before backend can serve /api/charts/managed
blockers.workaround: cd backend && python -m alembic -c app/migrations/alembic.ini upgrade head

blockers.description: Chart builder useEffect has infinite loop bug — state object reference changes every render causing onPreviewChange → parent setState → re-render cycle
blockers.workaround: Replace state dependency with stable primitives (state.dataset?.id, state.chartType, JSON.stringify for objects)

blockers.description: Delete dataset endpoint returns 500 — cannot delete datasets via API
blockers.workaround: Delete directly from DB: docker exec recviz-postgres psql -U recviz -d superset_meta -c "DELETE FROM recviz_datasets WHERE sync_status = 'error'"

decisions.decision: Used showcase_* tables for test datasets instead of nonexistent transactions/breaks tables
decisions.rationale: recon_data DB has showcase tables, not the create_recon_db.py tables
Playwright specs require browser/server, were failing in Vitest runner

decisions.decision: Fixed stale bullet/box-plot tests to expect bar fallback
